title: Economics telemetry event
description: One economics telemetry event, discriminated by `event_type`. The union is CLOSED: an unknown event_type matches no branch and is rejected, rather than being stored as an untyped blob. Each branch declares additionalProperties:false, so exactly one branch can match a well-formed event and a payload that mixes branches matches none.
x-traigent-note: Discriminator values: funnel_event -> economics_funnel_event_schema, run_economics -> economics_run_event_schema, receipt -> economics_receipt_event_schema.
